title: Income Tax Appeal CIT(A) Chennai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Expert income tax appeal cit(a) chennai by IBBI Registered Valuer CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE) in Chennai. Fixed-fee pricing. Call +91-99622 60333.
bodyText:
Looking for expert income tax appeal cit(a) chennai? Virtual Auditor provides practitioner-grade income tax services in Chennai, led by CA V. Viswanathan — Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) | Associate Company Secretary (ACS) | Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE). We combine deep regulatory expertise with hands-on execution to deliver results within your timeline.

What is Income Tax Appeal CIT(A) Chennai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

HEADING2: What We Deliver
Professionally drafted appeal/reply/submission with detailed legal arguments. Case law compilation with relevant ITAT/High Court/Supreme Court decisions. Chronological evidence binder with indexed documentary proof. Representation at hearings before CIT(A), ITAT, NFAC, or AO. Post-order advisory on further appeal options and compliance.
HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor
Virtual Auditor specialises in income tax litigation and assessment defence. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE) handles complex matters including scrutiny assessments, reassessment proceedings under Section 148, penalty appeals under Section 270A, transfer pricing disputes, and faceless assessment replies. We have a strong track record of securing favourable orders.
Our Chennai office is located at G-131, Ground Floor, Phase III, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002. Call +91-99622 60333 for an in-person consultation.
Income tax litigation requires deep understanding of assessment procedures, appellate timelines, and case law precedent. We handle matters across all forums — AO proceedings, CIT(A)/NFAC appeals, ITAT hearings, and High Court references. Specific expertise in Section 148 reassessment challenges, Section 270A penalty proceedings, transfer pricing disputes, Section 263 revision petitions, and faceless assessment replies under the e-Assessment Scheme.
HEADING2: Our Process
Step 1: Order/notice review and legal position assessment. Step 2: Strategy formulation — grounds of appeal, case law research. Step 3: Drafting of appeal/reply/written submissions. Step 4: Filing within statutory timelines with pre-deposit (if applicable). Step 5: Hearing representation and post-order advisory. 
We handle both faceless and physical hearings across all income tax forums in India. For faceless proceedings under the e-Assessment Scheme, we prepare structured digital submissions optimised for the NFAC review process. For physical hearings, CA V. Viswanathan personally appears and argues the case.
HEADING2: Get Started Today
Ready to engage Virtual Auditor for income tax appeal cit(a) chennai? Contact us for a free initial consultation:

Visit: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase III, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002
No obligation. We will assess your requirements and provide a clear scope, timeline, and fixed-fee quote within 24 hours.

faqs.q: What is the time limit for filing income tax appeal cit(a)?
faqs.a: Income tax appeals before CIT(A)/NFAC must be filed within 30 days of the assessment order. ITAT appeals within 60 days. Late filing requires condonation with valid reasons. Contact us immediately upon receiving an adverse order — delay reduces options.

faqs.q: What is the fee for income tax appeal cit(a)?
faqs.a: Fees depend on the complexity, disputed amount, and forum. We offer transparent pricing with no hidden charges. Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a customised quote. Initial consultation and case assessment is free.

faqs.q: Can Virtual Auditor handle income tax appeal cit(a) across India?
faqs.a: Yes. With physical offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, and the ability to appear before NFAC (faceless) and ITAT benches across India, we handle income tax matters nationwide. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA) is authorised to represent assessees before all income tax authorities.
